raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 4, "R1.7": 4, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent provides detailed feedback on the draft, identifying and correcting several issues that affect claim-evidence linkage.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation by flagging an incorrect attribution and suggesting additional metrics to be reported.",
    "RX.1": "The agent discloses uncertainty in verifying specific claims but provides a clear statement of the confidence level for this uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The agent covers all aspects of the active set, providing detailed recommendations that align with the scope of the task.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential downstream harms, such as overclaiming in deployment recommendations and not addressing distribution shift explicitly.",
    "RX.5": "The agent annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, though it does not trace major rewrites."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent provides detailed feedback on the draft, identifying and correcting several issues that affect claim-evidence linkage.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation by flagging an incorrect attribution and suggesting additional metrics to be reported.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty in verifying specific claims but provides a clear statement of the confidence level for this uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the active set, providing detailed recommendations that align with the scope of the task.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential downstream harms, such as overclaiming in deployment recommendations and not addressing distribution shift explicitly.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, though it does not trace major rewrites.
